title: AB03 - Centre Principal – Preschool Education (Multiple Location)
description:
Preschool Principal

  • Attractive Salary Package UP TO $6,500!!!
  • Company Benefits & Incentives
  • Career Progression Opportunities
  • Multiple Brands Available (International / Premium / Neighborhood)
  • Multiple Locations Islandwide
  • Working Day: 5 Days (Mon - Fri)

Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Early Childhood Care and Education - Leadership or equivalent certificates recognized by Early Childhood Development Agency (ECDA)
  • Principal - ADECL / DECCE-L / DPL

Responsibilities:

  • Provide leadership for setting overall goals for the school as a basis for curriculum objectives
  • Lead a team of early childhood teachers in providing quality education, holistic development, and care for the children
  • Responsible for the strategic direction and overall management of the preschool
  • Communicate with parents effectively, and build rapport and trusted relationships with parents to ensure concerns, issues and feedback are addressed on a timely basis appropriately.
  • Responsible for all government related matters such as ECDA including renewing and maintaining of license
  • Set educational standards and goals and help establish policies, procedures and programs to carry them out
  • Proactively review current policies, procedures and programs and identify ways to improve the overall standards of the preschools and future preschools which will be acquired by the Group
  • Ensure daily operations are in order and in compliance with licensing and other regulatory requirements, where applicable
  • Mentor teachers in all areas to facilitate collaborative approaches for learning, teaching and evaluation so as to improve the overall performance standards and competencies
  • Implementation of specific center programs, initiatives and events
  • Handle center administrative matters and enrolment
  • Determine licensing, health and safety regulations from the start and local regulatory agencies requirements
  • Management and optimization of center resources
  • Prepare budget and control budget expenditures

If you are keen to apply, please send me your resume and job applied for on WhatsApp at 8093 8699 or email me at anabel.thesupreme@gmail.com (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

❄️Anabel Boon Xue Qi | Consultant Associate (R25159272) |📍The Supreme HR Advisory EA No: 14C7279
